title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF KIALEG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BANSALAN, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO BARRIO MAGSAYSAY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 234 / 55 OG No. 17, 3085 (April 27, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2106, April 03, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF KIALEG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BANSALAN, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO BARRIO MAGSAYSAY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Kialeg in the Municipality of Bansalan, Province of Davao, is changed to Barrio Magsaysay.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 3, 1959.
